name: Ashwagandha Root Powder
description: Premium organic Ashwagandha root powder for stress relief, improved energy, and better sleep. Known as the 'King of Ayurvedic Herbs', it helps balance cortisol levels and supports overall vitality.

name: Triphala Capsules
description: Traditional Ayurvedic blend of three fruits - Amalaki, Bibhitaki, and Haritaki. Supports healthy digestion, detoxification, and gentle cleansing of the digestive tract.

name: Brahmi Memory Booster
description: Pure Brahmi extract to enhance memory, concentration, and cognitive function. Traditionally used to support brain health and mental clarity.

name: Chyawanprash - Immunity Booster
description: Ancient Ayurvedic superfood jam made with 40+ herbs and Amla. Boosts immunity, improves respiratory health, and provides daily nourishment.

name: Neem Purifying Tablets
description: Pure Neem extract tablets for blood purification, clear skin, and detoxification. Supports healthy skin and helps maintain natural defenses.

name: Turmeric Curcumin Complex
description: High-potency Turmeric with enhanced Curcumin absorption. Anti-inflammatory support for joints, immunity, and overall wellness.

name: Shatavari Women's Wellness
description: Premium Shatavari root extract for women's hormonal balance, reproductive health, and vitality. The queen of herbs for women.

name: Giloy Immunity Drops
description: Concentrated Giloy (Guduchi) extract drops for powerful immunity support. Known as 'Amrita' - the root of immortality in Ayurveda.
